attempts.error_detail: Nonce 1964 was 31 ahead of chain head (last_executed_tx_nonce=1923 at attempt time). Local nonce-manager had drifted from chain reality due to agent-welcome's bypass of the manager (see audit.md root-cause section). sbtc-send-runner returned generic failure within 1.5s — likely never reached mempool.

retry_plan: Re-run `arc skills run --name eic-payout -- execute --date 2026-04-24` after Phase C (gap-fill 1924-1932) and Phase E (clean local in-flight state). Idempotency: upsertPayout uses ON CONFLICT(date) DO UPDATE; cli short-circuit at line 267-269 fires only on status='sent' — current status='failed' falls through cleanly. Expected new nonce 1934+ (post-Day-2-confirmation).
